night1.single_pre_submission_recommendation: Full-scale residual mixed-class sensitivity audit at depth=7 / 300k / all 60 rules / all official variants.

mcmc_vs_enumeration.subject: review-stage/experiments/night2/compare_enum_vs_mcmc.py
mcmc_vs_enumeration.key_finding: Real-data run on 7 rules: ALL 7 fail comparison_valid filter (mass_in_full_list 0.13-0.52). Framework correctly refuses to certify compatibility. Three remediations documented.

sensitivity_audit.scope: depth=7, max_programs=300k, 55 rules, summed prior, audit_n=2000
sensitivity_audit.verdict: Night 1 R3 F1 bound holds at full scale; 0/55 top1 flips. Cleared per Codex N1 R4 condition.

visualization_e2e.result: 1 passed, 1 warning in 1.59s; symlink fix from prior session still working

night2.summary: MCMC framework promoted Codex 6 -> 8 -> 9 -> 9 with verdict needs-work -> almost -> almost -> accept across 4 rounds. Adversarial hands ACCEPT R1. Real MCMC comparison surfaced validity-gating success: all 7 tested rules failed pre-registered filter, demonstrating the framework catches the failure mode it was designed to catch.
